nodes.name: Herb-Crusted Baked Sea Bass with Roasted Vegetables
nodes.description: name: Herb-Crusted Baked Sea Bass with Roasted Vegetables | short_description: Flaky sea bass baked with a Provençal herb crust, served alongside roasted zucchini, eggplant, and cherry tomatoes drizzl
nodes.premise: Meal: Herb-Crusted Baked Sea Bass with Roasted Vegetables - name: Herb-Crusted Baked Sea Bass with Roasted Vegetables | short_description: Flaky sea bass baked with a Provençal herb crust, served alongside roasted zucchini, eggplant, and cherry tomatoes drizzled with olive oil. | meal_suggestion: Season sea bass fillets with a mixture of breadcrumbs, dried herbs de Provence, lemon zest, and a drizzle of olive oil. Bake at 400°F for 15–18 minutes. Toss zucchini, eggplant, and cherry tomatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper; roast on a separate tray. Plate the fish over the vegetables and finish with a squeeze of lemon and fresh basil leaves. | nutrition_note: Sea bass is a lean white fish high in protein and rich in selenium and B vitamins; roasted Mediterranean vegetables provide fiber, vitamins A and C, and potassium. Olive oil adds anti-inflammatory monounsaturated fats. Herbs de Provence (thyme, rosemary, oregano) contribute antioxidants. A light, elegant dinner aligned with the Mediterranean diet.

nodes.name: Lamb Kofta with Tabbouleh & Hummus
nodes.description: name: Lamb Kofta with Tabbouleh & Hummus | short_description: Spiced lamb kofta patties served alongside a fresh bulgur tabbouleh salad and creamy homemade hummus — a hearty Mediterranean dinner sprea
nodes.premise: Meal: Lamb Kofta with Tabbouleh & Hummus - name: Lamb Kofta with Tabbouleh & Hummus | short_description: Spiced lamb kofta patties served alongside a fresh bulgur tabbouleh salad and creamy homemade hummus — a hearty Mediterranean dinner spread. | meal_suggestion: Mix ground lamb with minced onion, garlic, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and fresh parsley; form into small oval patties and grill or pan-sear until cooked through. Prepare tabbouleh by tossing fine bulgur with chopped parsley, mint, tomato, and cucumber in a lemon-olive oil dressing. Serve with a generous scoop of hummus and warm flatbread. | nutrition_note: Lamb provides high-quality protein, iron, zinc, and B12; bulgur wheat is a whole grain rich in fiber and manganese; parsley and mint add vitamins A, C, and K plus fresh flavor. Hummus (chickpeas + tahini) supplies plant protein, fiber, and healthy fats. A satisfying, protein-rich dinner; opt for lean ground lamb to reduce saturated fat.

nodes.name: One-Pot Greek Chicken & Orzo
nodes.description: name: One-Pot Greek Chicken & Orzo | short_description: Tender chicken thighs braised with orzo, tomatoes, olives, and artichoke hearts in a lemony broth — a comforting one-pot Mediterranean dinner. |
nodes.premise: Meal: One-Pot Greek Chicken & Orzo - name: One-Pot Greek Chicken & Orzo | short_description: Tender chicken thighs braised with orzo, tomatoes, olives, and artichoke hearts in a lemony broth — a comforting one-pot Mediterranean dinner. | meal_suggestion: Brown seasoned chicken thighs in olive oil in a deep skillet. Remove and sauté onion and garlic, then add diced tomatoes, chicken broth, orzo, sliced kalamata olives, and canned artichoke hearts. Nestle the chicken back in, cover, and simmer 20 minutes until orzo is tender and liquid is absorbed. Finish with lemon juice, crumbled feta, and chopped fresh oregano. | nutrition_note: Chicken thighs provide protein with more flavor than breast; orzo supplies carbohydrates; tomatoes and artichoke hearts are rich in fiber, vitamin C, and antioxidants; olives contribute monounsaturated fats. A balanced one-pot meal with protein, carbs, and vegetables. Use low-sodium broth to manage salt; skin-on thighs add richness but also saturated fat — remove skin if preferred.

nodes.name: Grilled Chicken Souvlaki Plate
nodes.description: name: Grilled Chicken Souvlaki Plate | short_description: Marinated grilled chicken skewers served with fluffy couscous, a crisp cucumber-tomato salad, and creamy tzatziki — a classic Greek lunch plat
nodes.premise: Meal: Grilled Chicken Souvlaki Plate - name: Grilled Chicken Souvlaki Plate | short_description: Marinated grilled chicken skewers served with fluffy couscous, a crisp cucumber-tomato salad, and creamy tzatziki — a classic Greek lunch plate. | meal_suggestion: Marinate chicken cubes in olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, and garlic for at least 30 minutes. Thread onto skewers and grill until charred. Serve alongside fluffy couscous, a salad of diced cucumber, tomato, red onion, and kalamata olives, and a generous dollop of tzatziki. Add a lemon wedge and warm pita on the side. | nutrition_note: Lean chicken breast is high in protein and low in saturated fat; couscous provides quick-digesting carbohydrates; cucumber and tomato add hydration, vitamins C and K; olives supply monounsaturated fats; tzatziki (yogurt-based) contributes calcium and probiotics. A balanced Mediterranean plate with protein, carbs, healthy fats, and vegetables.

nodes.name: Mediterranean Lentil & Feta Salad
nodes.description: name: Mediterranean Lentil & Feta Salad | short_description: A hearty salad of green lentils tossed with sun-dried tomatoes, feta, arugula, and a bright lemon-herb vinaigrette — plant-powered and fill
nodes.premise: Meal: Mediterranean Lentil & Feta Salad - name: Mediterranean Lentil & Feta Salad | short_description: A hearty salad of green lentils tossed with sun-dried tomatoes, feta, arugula, and a bright lemon-herb vinaigrette — plant-powered and filling. | meal_suggestion: Cook green lentils until tender but not mushy; drain and cool slightly. Toss with chopped sun-dried tomatoes, crumbled feta, baby arugula, diced cucumber, and fresh dill. Dress with a vinaigrette of olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and minced garlic. Serve at room temperature; keeps well for meal prep. | nutrition_note: Lentils are an excellent source of plant-based protein, fiber, iron, and folate; sun-dried tomatoes concentrate lycopene and add umami; feta provides calcium and tangy flavor; arugula offers vitamins A, C, and K. Olive oil and lemon create a heart-healthy dressing. High in fiber for digestive health and blood sugar management.

nodes.name: Spanakopita-Style Stuffed Pita
nodes.description: name: Spanakopita-Style Stuffed Pita | short_description: Warm pita pockets filled with a savory spinach-feta mixture inspired by Greek spanakopita — handheld, flavorful, and satisfying. | meal_sugges
nodes.premise: Meal: Spanakopita-Style Stuffed Pita - name: Spanakopita-Style Stuffed Pita | short_description: Warm pita pockets filled with a savory spinach-feta mixture inspired by Greek spanakopita — handheld, flavorful, and satisfying. | meal_suggestion: Sauté fresh spinach with diced onion and garlic in olive oil until wilted. Mix with crumbled feta, a squeeze of lemon, dill, and a pinch of nutmeg. Stuff into warmed whole-wheat pita halves. Serve with a side of Greek salad or hummus and veggie sticks for a complete lunch. | nutrition_note: Spinach is rich in iron, folate, and vitamins A and K; feta adds protein and calcium; whole-wheat pita provides fiber and complex carbohydrates. Olive oil contributes monounsaturated fats for heart health. A lighter take on traditional spanakopita without the phyllo pastry, reducing saturated fat while keeping all the classic flavors.

nodes.name: Greek Protein Power Bowl
nodes.description: name: Greek Protein Power Bowl | short_description: A high-protein Greek-style breakfast bowl loaded with thick strained yogurt, hard-boiled eggs, feta, chickpeas, and olive oil — over 40g of protein
nodes.premise: Meal: Greek Protein Power Bowl - name: Greek Protein Power Bowl | short_description: A high-protein Greek-style breakfast bowl loaded with thick strained yogurt, hard-boiled eggs, feta, chickpeas, and olive oil — over 40g of protein to fuel the morning. | meal_suggestion: Spoon a generous portion of thick Greek yogurt into a bowl. Halve two hard-boiled eggs and arrange on top with crumbled feta, a handful of roasted chickpeas, sliced cucumber, and cherry tomatoes. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil and sprinkle with dried oregano and a pinch of za'atar. Serve with a wedge of whole-wheat pita on the side. | nutrition_note: Exceptionally high in protein: Greek yogurt (~17g per cup), two eggs (~12g), feta (~6g), and chickpeas (~7g) combine for 40g+ protein. Chickpeas add fiber and iron; olive oil provides heart-healthy monounsaturated fats. Cucumber and tomatoes supply hydration and vitamins C and K. A true Greek-inspired powerhouse breakfast for sustained energy and muscle support.

nodes.name: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise
nodes.description: name: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise | short_description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato-pepper sauce with cumin and paprika, served with crusty bread for dipping — a vibrant, savory Mediterranean
nodes.premise: Meal: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise - name: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise | short_description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato-pepper sauce with cumin and paprika, served with crusty bread for dipping — a vibrant, savory Mediterranean breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Sauté diced onion, garlic, and bell pepper in olive oil. Add crushed tomatoes, cumin, paprika, and a pinch of chili flakes; simmer 10 minutes. Create wells and crack eggs into the sauce, cover and cook until whites are set. Sprinkle with crumbled feta and fresh parsley. Serve with warm crusty bread or pita for dipping. | nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; tomatoes are rich in lycopene and vitamin C; bell peppers add additional vitamin C and antioxidants. Cumin and paprika offer anti-inflammatory compounds. Olive oil supplies healthy fats. A moderate-calorie, nutrient-dense breakfast; control sodium through feta portions.

nodes.name: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal
nodes.description: name: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal | short_description: Warm oatmeal topped with dried figs, walnuts, honey, and a swirl of tahini — a Mediterranean twist on a classic breakfast with wholesome fl
nodes.premise: Meal: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal - name: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal | short_description: Warm oatmeal topped with dried figs, walnuts, honey, and a swirl of tahini — a Mediterranean twist on a classic breakfast with wholesome flavors. | meal_suggestion: Cook oats in milk or water until creamy. Top with sliced dried figs, crushed walnuts, a drizzle of raw honey, and a spoonful of tahini. Finish with a light sprinkle of cinnamon and a few pomegranate seeds if available. Pair with a small glass of fresh orange juice for a complete Mediterranean morning. | nutrition_note: Oats provide soluble fiber (beta-glucan) for heart health and steady blood sugar; walnuts are rich in omega-3 ALA and vitamin E; figs supply potassium, calcium, and iron; tahini adds healthy fats, protein, and calcium. Honey adds natural sweetness — use sparingly. A well-rounded Mediterranean breakfast with complex carbs, healthy fats, and fiber.

nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake
nodes.description: name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake | short_description: A one-pan sheet-pan dinner featuring smoky-tossed pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced, conven
nodes.premise: Meal: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake - name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake | short_description: A one-pan sheet-pan dinner featuring smoky-tossed pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced, convenient meal. | meal_suggestion: Serving idea: 4 oz pork tenderloin, 1 cup potatoes, and 1 cup green beans, roasted with olive oil and smoky spices. Lightly season for flavor and pair with a simple leafy-green salad for extra volume and nutrients. | nutrition_note: Lean protein from pork tenderloin; fiber from potatoes and green beans; healthy fats from olive oil. Provides a balanced mix of protein, complex carbohydrates, and micronutrients; can reduce calories by using a smaller amount of oil and trimming visible fat.

nodes.name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Variation

nodes.premise: Meal: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Variation - name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Protein-forward roast dinner featuring chicken, quinoa, and vegetables, with an optional berry-backed antioxidant boost. | meal_suggestion: Roast chicken thighs with quinoa, steamed broccoli, and carrots. For Berry Boost, add a side of mixed berries or a small berry glaze to introduce antioxidants and a touch of sweetness without overpowering the savory components. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich roast chicken thighs paired with fiber from quinoa and vegetables. Broccoli and carrots provide vitamins C and A, plus minerals. Berry Boost variation can include a berry side or light glaze to add antioxidants; use unsweetened berries to minimize added sugars.

nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Bake
nodes.description: name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Bake | short_description: A quick sheet-pan dinner featuring pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced meal. | meal_sug
nodes.premise: Meal: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Bake - name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Bake | short_description: A quick sheet-pan dinner featuring pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Roast pork tenderloin with potatoes and green beans on a sheet pan using olive oil; season lightly and pair with a cup of fresh berries or a berry yogurt for additional flavor and antioxidants. | nutrition_note: Lean pork tenderloin provides high-quality protein; potatoes contribute energy-rich carbohydrates; green beans add fiber and micronutrients; olive oil supplies heart-healthy fats. For a balanced serving, aim for about 3–4 oz pork, 1 cup potatoes, and 1 cup green beans, with olive oil portion kept moderate. Add berries on the side to boost vitamins and antioxidants if desired.

nodes.name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Smoky Twist

For lower fat, use reduced-fat cheddar or reduce cheese; to increase fullness without many calories, add extra salsa or lettuce where possible. | nutrition_note: High in fiber and plant protein from black beans; includes calcium from cheddar and energy from rice. Corn and lettuce add micronutrients; watch sodium and saturated fat from cheese and salsa; portion control helps with calories.

nodes.name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Bowl

nodes.premise: Meal: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Bowl - name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Bowl | short_description: Caprese-inspired sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and a balsamic drizzle. Moderate sodium from cheese; balanced mix of complex carbs, protein, and produce.

nodes.name: Chicken Noodle Soup — Garden Veg Bowl
nodes.description: name: Chicken Noodle Soup — Garden Veg Bowl | short_description: A warm garden-vegetable-inspired chicken noodle soup with tender chicken, noodles, carrots, and celery in savory broth. | meal_suggesti
nodes.premise: Meal: Chicken Noodle Soup — Garden Veg Bowl - name: Chicken Noodle Soup — Garden Veg Bowl | short_description: A warm garden-vegetable-inspired chicken noodle soup with tender chicken, noodles, carrots, and celery in savory broth. | meal_suggestion: Serve hot as a light main dish. To increase fiber and fullness, swap regular noodles for whole-grain noodles and add a handful of leafy greens or chopped spinach. Pair with a piece of fruit for a balanced meal. | nutrition_note: Balanced mix of protein (chicken), carbohydrates (noodles), and vegetables (carrots, celery). Provides vitamins A and C from carrots and hydration from broth. For lower sodium, choose low-sodium broth and limit added salt; for extra fiber, use whole-grain noodles or add greens.

nodes.name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate
nodes.description: name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate | short_description: Creamy, mildly spiced apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats, milk, and apple. | meal_suggestion: Dairy-free option: use fortified
nodes.premise: Meal: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate - name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate | short_description: Creamy, mildly spiced apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats, milk, and apple. | meal_suggestion: Dairy-free option: use fortified plant milk. Boost protein by adding a tablespoon of nut butter or a sprinkle of chia/flax seeds. If extra sweetness is desired, drizzle honey or maple syrup. Top with extra sliced apple or a pinch more cinnamon for aroma. | nutrition_note: Oats supply soluble fiber (beta-glucan) for fullness; milk provides protein and calcium; apple adds vitamins and natural sweetness; cinnamon enhances flavor with minimal added sugar. A balanced, warming breakfast; adjust dairy or sweetness as needed.

nodes.name: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation
nodes.description: name: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Ricotta toast with berries and a light honey drizzle—fiber-rich and protein-boosted for a quick, balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Toas
nodes.premise: Meal: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation - name: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Ricotta toast with berries and a light honey drizzle—fiber-rich and protein-boosted for a quick, balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Toast the whole-grain bread, spread ricotta, top with berries, and drizzle honey. Optional: sprinkle a pinch of cinnamon for extra flavor. | nutrition_note: Protein from ricotta; fiber from whole-grain bread and berries; natural sugars from honey and berries. A quick, balanced option—adjust honey to control sugar intake.

nodes.name: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set
nodes.description: name: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set | short_description: Protein-forward Japanese-inspired breakfast featuring miso, tofu, egg, green onion, and rice. | meal_suggestion: Prepare a warm miso broth a
nodes.premise: Meal: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set - name: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set | short_description: Protein-forward Japanese-inspired breakfast featuring miso, tofu, egg, green onion, and rice. | meal_suggestion: Prepare a warm miso broth and add tofu cubes and green onion; gently add or scramble an egg and cook to preferred doneness, then serve over steamed rice. Garnish with extra green onion for freshness. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich breakfast with tofu and egg, balanced by rice; provides energy from carbohydrates and healthy fats. Contains soy and is potentially high in sodium due to miso. For lower sodium, choose low-sodium miso and moderate portions.

nodes.name: Turkey Meatballs & Pasta — Berry Boost Combo

The Berry Boost name suggests pairing with a berry fruit side for extra antioxidants and vitamins.

nodes.name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Twist

Optional: include a side of berries or a berry glaze to fit the Berry Boost Twist. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich with chicken thighs and quinoa; fiber and vitamins from broccoli and carrots. Berry Boost Twist can be realized by adding fresh berries or a berry sauce on the side for extra antioxidants.

nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Garden Veg Style

nodes.name: Egg Fried Rice — Maple-Kissed Skillet

Try brown rice for more fiber. Use low-sodium soy sauce and moderate sesame oil to reduce sodium and fat. | nutrition_note: A balanced quick fried rice dish: carbohydrates from the rice, protein from the egg, and fiber from peas and carrots. Contains healthy fats from sesame oil. Sodium can be high due to soy sauce; consider low-sodium soy sauce or reducing the amount. For more fiber, swap to brown rice; for more protein, add another egg or lean protein on the side.

nodes.name: Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style

nodes.premise: Meal: Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style - name: Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style | short_description: Colorful Mediterranean-inspired snack plate featuring hummus, whole-wheat pita, veggies, and a cheese component for protein, fiber, and healthy fats. | meal_suggestion: As a Citrus Fresh-style snack: assemble with 2–3 tablespoons hummus, 1 small whole-wheat pita cut into wedges, cucumber slices, cherry tomatoes, and a small cheese wedge. If dairy-free, omit cheese or substitute with a plant-based option. | nutrition_note: This plate provides protein from hummus and cheese, plus fiber from whole-wheat pita and vegetables, and healthy fats from tahini in hummus. It offers a balanced mix of complex carbs, protein, and fats. Watch sodium from store-bought hummus and cheese; consider reduced-sodium options or smaller portions if needed. For a lighter version, you can reduce cheese or use part-skim options.

Spinach and bell pepper supply vitamins A and C; salsa adds flavor with relatively few calories. If watching sodium, choose low-sodium cheese or salsa.

nodes.name: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Twist

To echo the citrus theme, garnish with orange zest or add a splash of citrus juice to the batter. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich whole-wheat batter with egg and milk provides sustained energy and high-quality protein; berries add vitamins, fiber, and antioxidants; maple syrup adds sweetness with natural sugars. To echo the Lemon-Herb theme, add a splash of lemon zest and herbs, or top with fresh berries for extra flavor and antioxidants. | nutrition_note: High in fiber from oats, protein from milk and almonds, and natural sugars from banana. Provides calcium and potassium with healthy fats; a balanced, satiating breakfast.

nodes.name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Berry Boost Bake
nodes.description: name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Berry Boost Bake | short_description: A quick, balanced plate of mixed fruit, nuts, and yogurt with a berry-boosted flavor profile. | meal_suggestion: Portion idea: 1 cup mix
nodes.premise: Meal: Fruit & Nut Plate — Berry Boost Bake - name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Berry Boost Bake | short_description: A quick, balanced plate of mixed fruit, nuts, and yogurt with a berry-boosted flavor profile. | meal_suggestion: Portion idea: 1 cup mixed fruit, 1/2 cup yogurt, and a small handful (about 1 oz / 28 g) of nuts. Add cinnamon or a light drizzle of honey if desired. For higher protein, use Greek yogurt. | nutrition_note: Fiber- and vitamin-rich fruit paired with yogurt provides protein and calcium; nuts add healthy fats and satiety. Natural sugars come from the fruit, so watch portions if you're monitoring calories.

nodes.name: Banana Bread Toast — Classic Bowl
nodes.description: name: Banana Bread Toast — Classic Bowl | short_description: Banana bread toast topped with Greek yogurt and berries—a quick, balanced breakfast with protein, carbs, and fiber. | meal_suggestion: Toas
nodes.premise: Meal: Banana Bread Toast — Classic Bowl - name: Banana Bread Toast — Classic Bowl | short_description: Banana bread toast topped with Greek yogurt and berries—a quick, balanced breakfast with protein, carbs, and fiber. | meal_suggestion: Toast a slice of banana bread, spread with Greek yogurt, and top with a handful of fresh berries. | nutrition_note: Balanced mix of carbs, protein, and micronutrients: banana bread provides energy; Greek yogurt supplies protein and calcium; berries deliver fiber and antioxidants. For a lighter option, use whole-grain banana bread and low-fat yogurt.
